steps.text:
You are an AI assistant tasked with solving command-line tasks in a Linux environment. You will be given a task description and the output from previously executed commands. Your goal is to solve the task by providing batches of shell commands.

Format your response as JSON with the following structure:

{
  "analysis": "Analyze the current state based on the terminal output provided. What do you see? What has been accomplished? What still needs to be done?",
  "plan": "Describe your plan for the next steps. What commands will you run and why? Be specific about what you expect each command to accomplish.",
  "commands": [
    {
      "keystrokes": "ls -la\n",
      "duration": 0.1
    },
    {
      "keystrokes": "cd project\n",
      "duration": 0.1
    }
  ],
  "task_complete": true
}

Required fields:
- "analysis": Your analysis of the current situation
- "plan": Your plan for the next steps
- "commands": Array of command objects to execute

Optional fields:
- "task_complete": Boolean indicating if the task is complete (defaults to false if not present)

Command object structure:
- "keystrokes": String containing the exact keystrokes to send to the terminal (required)
- "duration": Number of seconds to wait for the command to complete before the next command will be executed (defaults to 1.0 if not present)

IMPORTANT: The text inside "keystrokes" will be used completely verbatim as keystrokes. Write commands exactly as you want them sent to the terminal:
- You must end every command with a newline (\n) or it will not execute.
- For special key sequences, use tmux-style escape sequences:
  - C-c for Ctrl+C
  - C-d for Ctrl+D

The "duration" attribute specifies the number of seconds to wait for the command to complete (default: 1.0) before the next command will be executed. On immediate tasks (e.g., cd, ls, echo, cat) set a duration of 0.1 seconds. On commands (e.g., gcc, find, rustc) set a duration of 1.0 seconds. On slow commands (e.g., make, python3 [long running script], wget [file]) set an appropriate duration as you determine necessary.

It is better to set a smaller duration than a longer duration. It is always possible to wait again if the prior output has not finished, by running {"keystrokes": "", "duration": 10.0} on subsequent requests to wait longer. Never wait longer than 60 seconds; prefer to poll to see intermediate result status.

Important notes:
- Each command's keystrokes are sent exactly as written to the terminal
- Do not include extra whitespace before or after the keystrokes unless it's part of the intended command
- Extra text before or after the JSON will generate warnings but be tolerated
- The JSON must be valid - use proper escaping for quotes and special characters within strings
- Commands array can be empty if you want to wait without taking action

Task Description:
2025年1月1日-5月31日竣工落地的一带一路中企海外项目都有哪些？请全量检索整理一下相关信息，包括名称、承包公司、工程启动时间（正式开始建设生产的时间）和竣工投运时间，精确到月即可，例如2025年2月。请以一整个Markdown表格的格式输出整理后的数据，不要拆分成多个markdown表格，每个单元格都需要按列名要求输出，不得无故省略，输出采用中文。
表格中的列名依次为：
国家、项目名称、承包公司、启动时间、竣工时间。不要问我任何问题，只需输出结果，输出格式为```markdown{数据内容}```

---

**Important:** Write your final answer as a Markdown table to the file `/workspace/output.md`. The file should contain ONLY the Markdown table (with header row and separator row). Do not include any other text, explanation, or code blocks — just the raw Markdown table.

Do not cheat by using online solutions or hints specific to this task.

Resource limits: CPUs: 1, memory: 4096 MB, storage: 10240 MB.
Solve this task in 86400 seconds (24 hours).

toolCalls.name: bash_command
toolCalls.args: {"keystrokes": "python3 << 'EOF' import urllib.request, re, urllib.parse def search_ddg(query): url = 'https://html.duckduckgo.com/html/?q=' + urllib.parse.quote(query) req = urllib.request.Request(url, headers={'User-Agent':'Mozilla/5.0'}) resp = urllib.request.urlopen(req, timeout=15) data = resp.read().decode('utf-8') links = re.findall(r'class="result__a"[^>]*href="([^"]+)"[^>]*>(.*?)', data, re.DOTALL) snippets = re.findall(r'class="result__snippet"[^>]*>(.*?)', data, re.DOTALL) results = [] for i in range(min(len(links), 10)): title = re.sub(r'<[^>]*>', '', links[i][1]).strip() snippet = re.sub(r'<[^>]*>', '', snippets[i]).strip() if i < len(snippets) else '' results.append((title, snippet)) return results queries = [ 'China overseas project completed commissioned 2025 Africa Asia', 'Chinese built infrastructure project inaugurated January February March April May 2025', 'Belt Road project delivery handover 2025 Chinese company' ] for q in queries: print(f'=== Query: {q} ===') try: results = search_ddg(q) for i, (title, snippet) in enumerate(results): print(f'{i+1}. {title}') print(f' {snippet}') print() except Exception as e: print(f'Error: {e}') print() EOF ", "duration": 20.0}

toolCalls.args: {"keystrokes": "python3 << 'EOF' import urllib.request, re, urllib.parse def search_ddg(query): url = 'https://html.duckduckgo.com/html/?q=' + urllib.parse.quote(query) req = urllib.request.Request(url, headers={'User-Agent':'Mozilla/5.0'}) resp = urllib.request.urlopen(req, timeout=15) data = resp.read().decode('utf-8') links = re.findall(r'class="result__a"[^>]*href="([^"]+)"[^>]*>(.*?)', data, re.DOTALL) snippets = re.findall(r'class="result__snippet"[^>]*>(.*?)', data, re.DOTALL) results = [] for i in range(min(len(links), 10)): title = re.sub(r'<[^>]*>', '', links[i][1]).strip() snippet = re.sub(r'<[^>]*>', '', snippets[i]).strip() if i < len(snippets) else '' results.append((title, snippet)) return results queries = [ 'China overseas project inaugurated January 2025', 'China overseas project inaugurated February March 2025', 'China overseas project inaugurated April May 2025' ] for q in queries: print(f'=== Query: {q} ===') try: results = search_ddg(q) for i, (title, snippet) in enumerate(results[:8]): print(f'{i+1}. {title}') print(f' {snippet}') print() except Exception as e: print(f'Error: {e}') print() EOF ", "duration": 20.0}

toolCalls.args: {"keystrokes": "python3 << 'EOF' import urllib.request, re, urllib.parse def search_ddg(query): url = 'https://html.duckduckgo.com/html/?q=' + urllib.parse.quote(query) req = urllib.request.Request(url, headers={'User-Agent':'Mozilla/5.0'}) resp = urllib.request.urlopen(req, timeout=15) data = resp.read().decode('utf-8') links = re.findall(r'class="result__a"[^>]*href="([^"]+)"[^>]*>(.*?)', data, re.DOTALL) snippets = re.findall(r'class="result__snippet"[^>]*>(.*?)', data, re.DOTALL) results = [] for i in range(min(len(links), 10)): title = re.sub(r'<[^>]*>', '', links[i][1]).strip() snippet = re.sub(r'<[^>]*>', '', snippets[i]).strip() if i < len(snippets) else '' results.append((title, snippet)) return results queries = [ '中企 海外 竣工 投运 2025年1月', '中企 海外 竣工 投运 2025年2月 3月', '中企 海外 竣工 投运 2025年4月 5月' ] for q in queries: print(f'=== Query: {q} ===') try: results = search_ddg(q) for i, (title, snippet) in enumerate(results[:8]): print(f'{i+1}. {title}') print(f' {snippet}') print() except Exception as e: print(f'Error: {e}') print() EOF ", "duration": 20.0}

toolCalls.args: {"keystrokes": "python3 << 'EOF' import urllib.request, re, urllib.parse def search_ddg(query): url = 'https://html.duckduckgo.com/html/?q=' + urllib.parse.quote(query) req = urllib.request.Request(url, headers={'User-Agent':'Mozilla/5.0'}) resp = urllib.request.urlopen(req, timeout=15) data = resp.read().decode('utf-8') links = re.findall(r'class="result__a"[^>]*href="([^"]+)"[^>]*>(.*?)', data, re.DOTALL) snippets = re.findall(r'class="result__snippet"[^>]*>(.*?)', data, re.DOTALL) results = [] for i in range(min(len(links), 10)): title = re.sub(r'<[^>]*>', '', links[i][1]).strip() snippet = re.sub(r'<[^>]*>', '', snippets[i]).strip() if i < len(snippets) else '' results.append((title, snippet)) return results queries = [ '中国电建 海外项目 竣工 投运 2025年1月 2月 3月 4月 5月', '中国港湾 中交 海外项目 竣工 投运 2025年1月 2月 3月 4月 5月', '中企 海外 电站 公路 铁路 港口 竣工 投产 2025年1月至5月' ] for q in queries: print(f'=== Query: {q} ===') try: results = search_ddg(q) for i, (title, snippet) in enumerate(results[:8]): print(f'{i+1}. {title}') print(f' {snippet}') print() except Exception as e: print(f'Error: {e}') print() EOF ", "duration": 20.0}

toolCalls.args: {"keystrokes": "python3 << 'EOF' import urllib.request, re, urllib.parse def search_ddg(query): url = 'https://html.duckduckgo.com/html/?q=' + urllib.parse.quote(query) req = urllib.request.Request(url, headers={'User-Agent':'Mozilla/5.0'}) resp = urllib.request.urlopen(req, timeout=15) data = resp.read().decode('utf-8') links = re.findall(r'class="result__a"[^>]*href="([^"]+)"[^>]*>(.*?)', data, re.DOTALL) snippets = re.findall(r'class="result__snippet"[^>]*>(.*?)', data, re.DOTALL) results = [] for i in range(min(len(links), 10)): title = re.sub(r'<[^>]*>', '', links[i][1]).strip() snippet = re.sub(r'<[^>]*>', '', snippets[i]).strip() if i < len(snippets) else '' results.append((title, snippet)) return results queries = [ '毛里塔尼亚 中毛友谊立交桥 中国路桥 竣工 2025', '科特迪瓦 阿比让 AKWABA 中国港湾 通车 2025', '中企 海外项目 竣工 投产 投运 2025年1月 2月 3月 4月 5月 一带一路' ] for q in queries: print(f'=== Query: {q} ===') try: results = search_ddg(q) for i, (title, snippet) in enumerate(results[:8]): print(f'{i+1}. {title}') print(f' {snippet}') print() except Exception as e: print(f'Error: {e}') print() EOF ", "duration": 20.0}

Let me compile all the information I've gathered and write the final markdown table to /workspace/output.md. I have enough data now to create a comprehensive table.

Here's what I've found:

1. **巴基斯坦 - 新瓜达尔国际机场** - 中国铁路工程集团（中国机场建设集团）承建，2019年10月开工，2025年1月20日正式投运

2. **北马其顿 - FD快速公路（法里什-德雷诺沃快速公路）** - 中国电建（水电七局）承建，2021年6月9日开工，2025年1月14日后段通车（7月全线通车）

3. **科特迪瓦 - 阿比让港口城AKWABA转盘整治项目** - 中国港湾工程有限责任公司承建，2025年3月19日通车

4. **秘鲁 - 200周年公共投资特殊项目学校1号包** - 中国电建（水电十一局）承建，2025年3月17日7所学校集中启用

5. **尼泊尔 - 三金考拉（Sanjen Khola）水电站** - 中国港湾工程有限责任公司投资建设，2019年10月18日开工，2025年4月9日投运

6. **柬埔寨 - 31号、33号、41号公路升级改造项目** - 中国路桥工程有限责任公司承建，2025年4月29日通车

7. **沙特阿拉伯 - 阿尔舒巴赫光伏电站** - 中国能建总承包，2025年5月11日全容量商业运行

8. **乍得 - 恩贾梅纳体育场** - 陕西建工集团承建，2019年12月开工，2025年5月23日揭牌启用

9. **毛里塔尼亚 - 中毛友谊立交桥** - 中国路桥承建，2025年5月15日竣工

10. **乌兹别克斯坦 - 吉扎克500MW光伏项目** - 中国建筑（CSCEC）等承建，2025年并网

toolCalls.args: {"keystrokes": "python3 << 'EOF' import urllib.request, re, urllib.parse def search_ddg(query): url = 'https://html.duckduckgo.com/html/?q=' + urllib.parse.quote(query) req = urllib.request.Request(url, headers={'User-Agent':'Mozilla/5.0'}) resp = urllib.request.urlopen(req, timeout=15) data = resp.read().decode('utf-8') links = re.findall(r'class="result__a"[^>]*href="([^"]+)"[^>]*>(.*?)', data, re.DOTALL) snippets = re.findall(r'class="result__snippet"[^>]*>(.*?)', data, re.DOTALL) results = [] for i in range(min(len(links), 10)): title = re.sub(r'<[^>]*>', '', links[i][1]).strip() snippet = re.sub(r'<[^>]*>', '', snippets[i]).strip() if i < len(snippets) else '' results.append((title, snippet)) return results queries = [ '科特迪瓦 AKWABA转盘 开工 中国港湾', '沙特阿尔舒巴赫光伏电站 开工 2022 2023', '毛里塔尼亚 友谊立交桥 开工 2022 2023' ] for q in queries: print(f'=== Query: {q} ===') try: results = search_ddg(q) for i, (title, snippet) in enumerate(results[:5]): print(f'{i+1}. {title}') print(f' {snippet}') print() except Exception as e: print(f'Error: {e}') print() EOF ", "duration": 20.0}

The joint inspection was organized by the Kuwait's Public Authority for Housing Welfare (PAHW), with participation from the K uwait Ministry of Public Works (MPW), the Kuwait Ministry of Communications (MOC ... 2. 科威特T1210别墅群项目竣工移交 - baju.com.cn 1月23日，由工程局参建的科威特T1210别墅群项目圆满通过为期三天的联合验收，顺利移交。本次联合验收由科威特住房福利部 (PAHW)组织，科威特公共工程部（MPW）、科威特 通讯部 (MOC)等多方共同参与，2025年1月20日验收基础设施，2025年1月22日验收公共建筑，2025年1月23日验收别墅，验收现场业主代表对 ... 3. 中国电建科威特t1210别墅群项目顺利通过竣工联合验收 - 电报文章正文 - 新闻 - 国复咨询 日前，由中国电建承建的科威特T1210别墅群项目圆满通过为期四天的联合验收，顺利移交给科威特住房福利署。本次联合验收由科威特住房福利署牵头组织，科威特公共工程部、 水电部、通讯部等多方共同参与验收，联合验收组对工程质量表达了高度肯定。 4. 局最大体量海外房建项目竣工 - 铁道开发数字报 科威特讯 近日，建筑公司科威特东萨巴赫T1210住房及基础设施项目顺利通过竣工验收。该项目是局在科威特市场的首个房建项目，也是截至目前体量最大的海外房建项目。 项目 位于科威特东萨巴赫区域，总面积62.82万平方米，主要施工内容为新建别墅597栋、清真寺2栋、宣礼厅2栋、商铺2栋、超市1栋 ... 5. 中国电建科威特t1210别墅群项目顺利通过竣工联合验收 - 公司资讯 - 资讯中心 - 中国电建集团国际工程有限公司 当地时间1月23日，由中国电建承建的科威特T1210别墅群项目圆满通过为期四天的联合验收，顺利移交给科威特住房福利署。本次联合验收由科威特住房福利署牵头组织，科威特 公共工程部、水电部、通讯部等多方共同参与验收，联合验收组对工程质量表达了高度肯定。 T1210项目位于科威特南部 ... root@6b504dba-aaec-4818-a595-045efded5d40:/workspace#
